name: Taxability of life insurance maturity proceeds
description: User's endowment policy maturing and they want to understand tax implications

input.message: My LIC Jeevan Umang policy with ₹15 lakh sum assured is maturing next month. Annual premium was ₹1,50,000. Will I have to pay any tax on the maturity amount? I bought it in 2012.

notes: Section 10(10D) exempts maturity if annual premium <= 10% of SA for policies after 01/04/2012. Premium 1.5L vs SA 15L = exactly 10%. Must check this boundary carefully. For pre-2012 policies, limit was 20%.
